name: Luxury Serum Product Showcase
description: High-end editorial studio product shot with mirror base, travertine slab, oil droplets, botanicals, and warm filtered daylight

subject.description: premium frosted glass serum bottle in warm amber tone with matte black dropper cap and minimalist ivory label

distinguishing_features: minimal ivory label with clean typography

skin.texture: material-accurate surface roughness and subtle micro-scratches

background: round mirror laid on warm beige surface
textured light travertine slab centered on mirror
clean studio backdrop in soft neutral gradient

props.details: scattered around product on mirror and slab
props.physics: realistic meniscus edges, reflections, and refraction

props.details: placed gently across slab and mirror to connect both surfaces
props.physics: natural contact shadows and slight stem curvature

environment.atmosphere: warm golden-hour premium editorial still life

effects: warm rim highlights on bottle edges
controlled shadow falloff preserving texture detail

realism_anchors: accurate droplet contact spread and highlight behavior
travertine pore detail with natural roughness
mirror reflection alignment with object geometry
botanical fiber detail and natural contact shadows

flattened_prompt: masterpiece, editorial luxury skincare product photo, amber frosted glass serum bottle with matte black dropper cap and minimal ivory label, centered on light travertine slab placed over round mirror on warm beige surface, facial oil droplets with realistic reflections and refraction scattered on slab and mirror, eucalyptus sprigs bridging both surfaces naturally, strong warm top-left sunlight with soft diagonal leaf shadows, shallow depth of field, 85mm macro f/2.8, ultra-detailed textures, 1:1
negative_prompt_flat: people, hands, warped label text, floating droplets, distorted reflections, blurry, low quality, cartoon, anime, watermark

color_palette.contrast: soft warm highlights against grounded natural tones

flux.prompt: editorial luxury product photo, amber frosted glass serum bottle matte black dropper cap ivory label, on travertine slab over round mirror on warm beige surface, facial oil droplets realistic reflections, eucalyptus sprigs, warm top-left sunlight with soft diagonal leaf shadows, 85mm macro f/2.8 shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed, 1:1
flux.negative_prompt: people, hands, warped text, floating droplets, distorted reflections, blurry, cartoon, anime, watermark

midjourney.prompt: luxury skincare product editorial, amber frosted serum bottle with matte black dropper cap on travertine slab over round mirror, oil droplets, eucalyptus sprigs, warm filtered top-left sunlight, diagonal leaf shadows, shallow depth of field, high texture realism --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for realistic material fidelity

ideogram.prompt: High-end studio product photograph of amber frosted glass serum bottle with matte black dropper cap and minimal ivory label, on travertine slab over round mirror, facial oil droplets and eucalyptus sprigs, warm top-left sunlight with leaf shadows, premium minimalist aesthetic

recraft.prompt: Luxury skincare product shot, amber frosted serum bottle on travertine slab and round mirror, oil droplets, eucalyptus accents, warm sunlight

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A high-end editorial studio photograph of a premium frosted glass serum bottle in warm amber with a matte black dropper cap and minimalist ivory label. The bottle is centered on a textured light travertine slab resting on a round mirror placed on a warm beige surface. Scattered facial oil droplets appear around the bottle on both slab and mirror with realistic reflections and refraction. A few eucalyptus sprigs lie naturally across the slab and mirror, visually connecting both surfaces. Strong warm sunlight enters from the top left and casts soft diagonal leaf shadows. The style is minimalist, organic, and premium, with realistic material rendering, shallow depth of field, and ultra-detailed texture. No people, no hands, no watermark, no warped text.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language with explicit material and lighting constraints

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: product, set dressing, surface stack, and prop physics are explicitly layered
2_realism_anchors: glass roughness, travertine pores, droplet optics, and contact shadows
3_technical_camera: 85mm macro, f/2.8, shallow depth, and 1:1 commercial framing
4_negative_hygiene: prevents human elements, text warping, reflection errors, and style leakage
5_spatial_consistency: mirror-slab-product ordering and prop overlap are spatially constrained
6_lighting_storytelling: warm top-left directional light plus leaf shadows drives premium mood
7_material_priority: texture-first rendering for packaging and surfaces
